items.badge_description: Fall is in the air and the holidays are just around the corner, but pies and jack-o-lanterns aren't the only things pumpkins are good for. Pumpkin beers have grown in popularity, bringing with them a delicate balance of malt and spices. That's 30 different beers with the style of Pumpkin / Yam! Try 5 more for Level 7!

Thanks for enjoying a beer at Hotel Sweeney's, make sure you check out the Rooftop while you're here. Keep drinking up through the untappd levels and make sure you show the bartenders when you reach levels 25 & 50 for your special gift.

user.bio: Home brewer, craft brewer, beer educator, beer drinker.
You can find me on Instagram mr_al_pal

items.badge_description: Fall is in the air and the holidays are just around the corner, but pies and jack-o-lanterns aren't the only things pumpkins are good for. Pumpkin beers have grown in popularity, bringing with them a delicate balance of malt and spices. That's 15 different beers with the style of Pumpkin / Yam! Try 5 more for Level 4!

Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

items.checkin_comment: I can taste the pumpkin spice but the beer is too mild so it comes off a bit weak. Gets nicer  towards the end

Cinnamon/AllSpice/ginger aroma Light body carries big spice payload Big cinnamon/allspice flavours underpinned by good yam/pumpkin/caramel sweetness Blends on mid to decent spiced fruit beer  that lingers nicely on finish Nicely crafted

user.bio:
Keeping my friends close,
 but my beers closer.
Life is too short to be fishing without Beer

items.badge_description: At a new place and don't want to choose a pint of something you may not like? Grab a few tasters! Enjoy some small pours and then decide which to upgrade to a full pour. That's 30 checkins with the serving style of Taster. Try 5 more for Level 7! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast
